title: McDonalds Fries Potatoes
description: Changes baked potatoes to look like McDonalds fries, because of the previous McDonalds Minecraft Movie event fries packaging!
body:
**Changes baked potatoes to look like McDonald's fries, because of the Mincraft Movie x McDonald's fries packaging! That's it!**

This pack is made for 1.21.5+, but will most likely work in most older versions.
